title: Learn from Indigenous Peoples How to Conserve Nature – Protect Nature Challenge - Canada.ca
content:
## Learn from Indigenous Peoples How to Conserve Nature – Protect Nature Challenge
Indigenous Peoples have been leaders in environmental stewardship, sustainable development and the management of natural resources on their lands since time immemorial.
Research has shown that spaces managed by Indigenous Peoples worldwide are significantly more biodiverse.
There are many initiatives now focusing on Indigenous leadership in nature conservation , including Indigenous guardians and Indigenous protected and conserved areas.
It is important for everyone to understand how Indigenous knowledge and leadership are key in conserving our natural environment.

## Let’s do this together
Share these challenges with your friends and family and show us what you are doing by tagging us in your social media messages and by using the hashtag #ProtectNature.
We’re on Instagram @canenvironment , Facebook @EnvironmentandClimateChange and Twitter @environmentca .
Check out our list of challenges to help protect nature.
